question: Which of the following is not a consideration for development of an adequate emergency handling procedure?

options.text: All landing areas, including emergency landing areas, should allow the recovery of the UA in an expeditious manner with adequate considerations made to safety and security.
Operator should identify landing areas for emergency recovery.
The operator should ensure that all devices, including UA, remote controller and any other devices used have their firmware updated to the latest versions.
The Operator should ensure that all map data necessary for navigation, including for the purpose of situational awareness and detect and avoid, are updated in a timely manner.
